---
title: ""
page-layout: article
---

# Hema Balarama

MRes/PhD Economics candidate, Department of Economics, London School of Economics and Political Science  
{.meta}

My research interests are in development, environmental, and labour economics.
{.lead}

MA in Economics (University of Toronto); BComm (Hons) in Econometrics and Economics (Monash University). Previously, predoctoral researcher at the Yale Economic Growth Center.

## Contact

- Email: [h.balarama@lse.ac.uk](mailto:h.balarama@lse.ac.uk)

## Pages

- [Research](research/index.qmd)
- [Teaching](teaching/index.qmd)
